docs.title: Rowan Wei GENG | 耿伟
docs.text:
wgeng252@connect.hkust-gz.edu.cn

I am currently (2024-02-04) a second-year M.Phil. student at HKUST(GZ) under the supervision of Prof. Pan Hui, Prof. Gareth Tyson, and Prof. Dirk Kutscher.

I will join Chair of Connected Mobility at TU Munich, as a doctoral researcher under the supervision of Prof. Jörg Ott.

docs.title: Short Bio
docs.text: Before joining HKUST(GZ), I worked as a Research & Development Software Engineer at Huawei Technologies Co., Ltd.. I obtained my M.Eng and B.Eng from Fudan University and Harbin Engineering University in 2020 and 2017 respectively. I also have internships in Ant Group Co., Ltd. and eBay Inc.. My current research interests lie in Edge Computing, Networked Systems.

docs.title: Research Interests
docs.text:
• Information-Centric Networking (ICN)
  • Edge Computing, Offloading for XR
  • Programming Languages Runtime Scheduling and Optimization (eg. Golang, Jave Runtimes)

docs.title: Working Experience
docs.text:
• Software Engineer - Huawei Technologies Co., Ltd., Shanghai, China - 2020~2022
  • Intern - Ant Group Co., Ltd., Hangzhou, China - Winter, 2018
  • Intern - eBay Inc., Shanghai, China - Summer, 2019

docs.title: Education
docs.text:
• M.Phil. - The Hong Kong University of Science and Technology, Guangzhou, China - 2022~current
  • M.Eng. - Fudan University, Shanghai, China - 2017~2020
  • B.Eng. - Harbin Engineering University, Harbin, China - 2013~2017

docs.title: News
docs.text:
News

2024-3: Glad to visit Technische Universität Munich. 2024-2: Glad to visit Politecnico di Milano. 2023-09-04: Honored to be selected to receive an ACM Travel Grant and an RBM Research Travel Grant. 2023-08-16: Glad to become a reviewer for ACM ICN 2023 Poster and Demo Track. 2023-08-07: We got an accepted paper in ACM ICN 2023.
